title: Marty Marquis
text:
A cartographer and spatial analyst based in Cascadia, Marty currently serves on the City Council in Scappoose, Oregon. Founding member of the band Blitzen Trapper, he toured extensively in North America and Europe for a dozen years and was inducted in the Oregon Music Hall of Fame in 2024.

title: Welcome
text: I’m a senior research analyst at ECOnorthwest in Portland, Oregon. I worked as a musician for over a decade before returning to school during the pandemic years to study geospatial information science and pivoting into my current work. My interests include reading, American football, and coding in R.
